flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Goldey-Beacom College rose 17% between 2021 and 2024 ($12.8k → $14.9k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Goldey-Beacom College rose 17% between 2021 and 2024 ($12.8k → $14.9k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Goldey-Beacom College fell 13% between 2021 and 2024 (82.1% → 71.8%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Goldey-Beacom College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.0% → 0.0%).
